08e79c720aa68fb5: [{"severity": "HIGH", "confidence": 7, "path": "squish/attention.py", "line": 29, "category": "red-team", "summary": "If self.v is already shaped [batch, n_heads, seq_len, head_dim], tiling by (1, self.n_heads, 1, 1) expands the heads axis to n_heads², so the matmul with scores shaped [batch, n_heads, 1, seq_len] will either broadcast silently into wrong results or crash at runtime.", "fix": "Use self.v directly in the matmul; if GQA head-expansion is genuinely needed, tile by n_heads // n_kv_heads along axis 1, not by n_heads."}]
b9494b0d70ecd7b7: [{"severity":"CRITICAL","confidence":10,"path":"squish/attention.py","line":29,"category":"memory-bandwidth","summary":"mx.tile materializes a full dense copy of the entire paged value cache on every decode step, doubling peak memory and memory bandwidth on the attention hot path.","fix":"Remove v_full and matmul directly against self.v as the original code did, eliminating the extra allocation and copy."}]
